title: UK Car Stickers 3-Pack Official Size - Incl UK Number Plate Stickers/UK Sticker for Driving Abroad/UK Car Stickers for Europe/GB Stickers for Car Europe/UK Number Plate Sticker (3pk UK)
features: UK Car Stickers for Europe and Rest of World: This 3-Pack contains 1 x "UK" vehicle sticker to exacting and official large EU/UK specifications (180x133mm) and (2) 2x UK number plate stickers for both front and back of your vehicle

UK Stickers For Car Europe: The perfect UK sticker for driving abroad, package contains UK Sticker in various sizes to suit any vehicle, plus fully compliant UK number plate stickers for Europe or anywhere else.
Premium Gloss Finish: European manufactured premium vinyl with gloss finish and 100 micron thickness.
Strong but Removable Adhesive: High quality European manufactured adhesive decalwhich leaves no sticky residue on removal. Apply decals to any smooth, dry surface indoors or outdoors
Durable and Weather-Resistant for Indoor or Outdoor Use: Our high grade self-adhesive vinyl stickers and labels are durable and suitable for indoor or outdoor use.
